creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
man.el port has been  ported. This port is for man in emacs with various
languages(now German, English and Japanese). 

I put the port packed with tar czf and uuencode below "Fix:"

Packed tarball is :
-rw-r--r--  1 kiri  staff  1241 Sep 21 21:39 i18n-man-1.1-980921.tar.gz
Packed list is :

drwxr-xr-x kiri/staff        0 Sep 21 21:34 1998 man.el/files/
